song.title: God of Grace and God of Glory
song.lyrics: [V1] .E F#m God of grace and God of Glory, .E A F#m E On Your people pour Your pow'r. .E F#m Crown Your ancient church's story. .E A F#m E Bring its bud to glorious flow'r. .F#m E Grant us wisdom, grant us courage, .E A B For the praising of this hour, .E A E B E For the praising of this hour. [V2] Though the hosts of evil 'round us, Scorn the Christ, assail his ways, From the fears that long have found us, Free our hearts to faith and praise. Grant us wisdom, grant us courage, For the living of these days, For the living of these days. [V3] Cure Your children's warring madness. Bend Your bride to Your control. Shame our want and selfish gladness, Rich in things and poor in soul. Grant us wisdom, grant us courage, Lest we miss Your kingdom's goal, Lest we miss Your kingdom's goal. [V4] Save us from weak resignation To the evils we deplore. Let the gift of Your salvation Be our glory, evermore. Grant us wisdom, grant us courage, Serving You whom we adore, Serving You whom we adore.
